courses.title: JavaScript Fundamentals
courses.description: Practical introduction course with clear progression and focus on real application. You learn the basics through hands-on exercises and real-world examples.
courses.content: Variables & types · Functions · DOM manipulation · Events · Async/Await · Modules

courses.title: HTML & CSS Modern Layout
courses.description: You build modern, responsive layouts with structure, semantics and reusable component patterns. The course alternates between short theory and design-driven coding exercises.
courses.content: Box model · Flexbox · CSS Grid · Responsive design · CSS variables · Animations

courses.title: React Essentials
courses.description: Deep dive into React with component architecture, state management and clear workflows. Focus is on building stable interfaces that work in real projects.
courses.content: JSX · Components · Props & State · useEffect · React Router · Context API

courses.title: Node.js API Basics
courses.description: You learn to build and structure REST APIs with Node.js from scratch to finished endpoint. The course emphasizes debugging, validation and robust server logic.
courses.content: Node fundamentals · Express · REST principles · Middleware · Error handling · json-server
